title: Plato Room Configuration
description: Schema for a Plato room configuration file (.room.json). A room defines sensors, actuators, alarms, and metadata for a physical or virtual space.

room_id.description: Unique identifier for the room. Must be snake_case.

tick_hz.description: Sensor polling frequency in Hz (ticks per second). Must be > 0.

history_capacity.description: Number of historical sensor readings to retain in the ring buffer.

sensors.description: Map of sensor key to sensor configuration.

actuators.description: Map of actuator key to actuator configuration.

alarms.description: List of alarm rules for this room.

type.description: Data type of the sensor reading.

unit.description: Unit of measurement. null for dimensionless readings.

source.description: Data source in format 'protocol:path'. Supported protocols: mqtt, gpio, pwm, adc, i2c, spi, modbus, bacnet, snmp, ipmi, zigbee, game.

range.description: Valid operating range [min, max]. null for unbounded.

alarm_range.description: Range that triggers concern [min, max]. null if no alarm threshold.

type.description: Data type of the actuator control.

range.description: Valid control range [min, max] for numeric actuators.

safe_default.description: Safe default value when control is lost. Must match the actuator type.

id.description: Unique alarm identifier within this room.

condition.description: Boolean expression for alarm trigger. References sensor keys by name. Supports: >, <, >=, <=, ==, !=, and, or.

cooldown_sec.description: Minimum seconds between repeated triggers of this alarm.

actions.description: List of actions to take when the alarm triggers.

location.description: Physical or logical location of the room.

hardware.description: Hardware platform running the room controller.

deployment.description: Deployment scenario this room belongs to.
